ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Full name of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., voltage, current, power) */,
  "industry_standard" TEXT /* Industry standard for the parameter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter being measured */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement (e.g., V, mA) */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., DC, AC) */,
  "precision" INTEGER /* Precision of the measurement */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value for the measurement */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value for the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the component (e.g., power supply, switch) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the component */,
  "revision_number" TEXT /* Revision number of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the component */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_parameters" (
  "component_param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component-parameter association */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter for the component */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter for the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_parameters_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_parameters_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, QA, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the industry standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component revision */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "revision_number" TEXT /* Revision number of the component */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was made */,
  "revision_description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_revisions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
